channel.title: 446f4cd9-bef8-4ad1-b906-b8f199d7ca54_3001 on Neueste Angebote
channel.description: Recent content in 446f4cd9-bef8-4ad1-b906-b8f199d7ca54_3001 on Neueste Angebote

item.title: Philips Domestic Appliances - Philips Senseo Switch Pad- und Filterkaffeemaschine 2-in-1-Brühtechnologie 1-Liter-Wasserbehälter 7 Tassen in einem Durchgang Klavierlackschwarz HD6592/64
item.description: Sie können Philips Domestic Appliances - Philips Senseo Switch Pad- und Filterkaffeemaschine 2-in-1-Brühtechnologie 1-Liter-Wasserbehälter 7 Tassen in einem Durchgang Klavierlackschwarz HD6592/64 hier: ℹ️: 7 Cup Thermal Jug - With the stainless steel thermal jug, you can prepare up to 7 cups of authentic filter coffee at once 1L WATER CONTAINER With the 1 litre water container, you can make up to 7 cups of coffee without refilling Stainless steel thermos flask: the stainless steel thermal jug preserves the temperature and aroma for hours One touch of a button: With the three simple control buttons, you can prepare 1 cup, 2 cups or a pot of coffee with just one touch of a button Delicious Crema: the fine selection of SENSEO pads and 2-in-1 brewing technology ensure that your perfect cup of SENSEO coffee always features a delicious crema 🛒 Hier!
